svg.title: From Pain to Venture – Part 01 Reference Images
svg.desc: Reference images for Part 01: C-P-S Fit framework and Launch Ladder.
svg.text: From Pain to Venture – Part 01 Reference Images
1. C-P-S Fit Framework
A structured map from felt phenomenon to customer context, problem gap,
solution hypothesis, MVP and CPS fit. Source: Strategyzer.
Key concept: The goal is not to have a solution, but to confirm C-P-S Fit —
Context, Problem, and Solution alignment in the right context.
2. Launch Ladder
Seven steps: Felt Phenomenon → Customer Context → Problem Gap → Solution
Hypothesis → MVP → Validation → C-P-S Fit. Before launch, the idea must
answer: whose gap, how formed, challenges, solution, success indicators, value.
Key tools referenced
• C-P-S Fit (Strategyzer) – alignment of Context, Problem, Solution
• Hypothesis Logbook – document assumptions and evidence
• Six Question Checklist – pre-launch validation gate
• JTBD (Jobs to be Done) – what the actor is trying to get done
• Important Unfulfilled – signal that a venture opportunity exists
• MVP Definition – cheapest credible way to test the key assumption
• Build-Measure-Learn – loop that reduces self-deception each round
Source: Strategyzer Value Proposition Canvas & Business Model Canvas
https://www.strategyzer.com/library/the-value-proposition-canvas
